cues.context: there's a function literally called "arrival without origin," and it doesn't generate a
a path — it calls "select groove by traffic" to choose from curves that
curves that already exist, named "grooves preceding me." The particle doesn't carve anything;
every eight seconds or so, "redistribute traffic" quietly reshuffles which channels get
get busier — a pattern shift the piece itself didn't choose,
